findings.title: permissions: write-all is used
findings.remediation: Replace write-all with explicit least-privilege permissions.

findings.title: id-token write without trust restriction
findings.message: Workflow grants id-token: write without a clear trusted branch restriction.
findings.remediation: Restrict OIDC use to trusted branches or protected environments and grant id-token only in the job that needs it.

findings.title: permissions: write-all is used
findings.remediation: Replace write-all with explicit least-privilege permissions.

findings.title: id-token write without trust restriction
findings.message: Job "dangerous" grants id-token: write without an environment or trusted branch restriction.
findings.remediation: Restrict OIDC use to trusted branches or protected environments and grant id-token only in the job that needs it.
